error_signature: n8n doesn’t have a direct 'move file' node
title: Simulating file move in n8n
symptom: Users cannot directly move files between folders using a single node in n8n. Instead, they must use a combination of read, write, and delete operations.
applies_when: Trying to move files between local folders
not_this_if: Using a different method to move files
root_cause: n8n lacks a dedicated 'move file' node, which necessitates a workaround using separate nodes for reading, writing, and deleting files. This can lead to confusion for users expecting a straightforward solution.
fix_steps: Add a Read File from Disk Node and set the file path to the source file in Folder A.
Add a Write File to Disk Node and set the file path to the destination in Folder B, connecting it to the Read File Node.
Add a Delete File from Disk Node and set the file path to the original file in Folder A, connecting it to the Write File Node.
agent_instruction: Use the Read, Write, and Delete File nodes to simulate moving a file between folders.
safety_notes: Ensure file paths are correct to avoid data loss.
